candidates.why: Current financing debt line; best match for short-term debt and excludes explicit lease line.

candidates.row_label: Current interest-bearing liabilities (for receivables guaranteed by EKN)
candidates.why: Also current financing-related debt; appears to be a separate current borrowing bucket and should be included if not already consolidated.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt; useful fallback/older-period label but may overlap with current interest-bearing liabilities.

final_choice.row_label: Current interest-bearing liabilities (for receivables guaranteed by EKN)

variables.notes: R:c. Chose the current interest-bearing debt rows on the balance sheet and excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per rule. Did not include 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to avoid possible double counting with the current interest-bearing liability totals.
